buff.title: Dawn's Guiding Light
buff.desc:
· Agent ATK increases by 30%, CRIT DMG increases by 15%.
· Enemy Stun DMG Multiplier increases by 20%.

buff.title: Piercing Thunder Strike
buff.desc:
· Agent <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color> increases by 20%.
· Agent <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</color>, and <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color> deal 40% increased DMG and ignore 15% of enemy DEF.

buff.title: Accumulating Frost
buff.desc:
· Agent <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color> increases by 20%, <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</color> DMG increases by 40%.
· After an Agent uses an <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color>, the Agent's <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color> additionally increases by 20% for 15s, repeated triggers reset the duration.

buff.title: Frost-Bitten Iron
buff.desc: · Agent CRIT DMG increases by 15%. While in <color=#FFFFFF>Ether Veil</color>, Agent ATK increases by 25%, and attacks ignore 10% of enemy's DEF.

buff.title: Rush of Lightning and Fire
buff.desc:
· Agent <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color> and <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color> increase by 30%, Anomaly Proficiency increases by 60.
· Agents start with 40 additional Energy, Attribute Anomaly DMG increases by 20%.

buff.title: Blazing Stream
buff.desc:
· Agent Sheer DMG increases by 10%, CRIT DMG increases by 25%.
· When an Agent's <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color> hits enemies, ignores 10% of their All-DMG RES.

buff.title: Fleeting Glory
buff.desc:
· While in <color=#FFFFFF>Ether Veil</color>, Agent ATK increases by 25% and CRIT DMG increases by 20%.
· When Agents hit enemies, they ignore 10% of enemy <color=#F0D12B>Physical RES</color>.

buff.title: Piercing Blade Abyss
buff.desc:
· Agent <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color> and <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color> increase by 15%.
· When Agents inflict an Attribute Anomaly on enemies, their DEF is reduced by 10%, and they take 20% more Attribute Anomaly DMG for 10s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.

buff.title: Cleanse the Heart with Fire
buff.desc:
· Agent <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color> increases by 20%.
· Agent <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</color> and <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color> DMG increase by 40%, and CRIT DMG increases by 30%.

buff.title: Thunderclap Shimmer
buff.desc:

buff.title: Everlasting Night Flame
